metadata.name: Report Broken Equipment in Campus Gym

description: A student reports that a treadmill in the campus recreation center is broken.

nodes.task_description: Identify the user and the location (rec center) and specific piece of equipment.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gathers the details of the issue.

nodes.task_description: Create a maintenance work order for the facilities team to inspect the equipment.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates a work order.

nodes.task_description: Notify the recreation center front desk staff to put an 'Out of Order' sign on the machine.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent calls or messages the gym staff to take the machine out of service.
